channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19909] sanity test_181 12MDT: mdc_enqueue_base() unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000254
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Andreas Dilger <adilger@dilger.ca>

This issue relates to the following test suite run:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b83930d7-cb82-40a7-8ba5-70a32f7cd9b4

When running a custom session running with "Test-Parameters: mdscount=3 mdtcount=12" for patch https://review.whamcloud.com/56384 ("LU-14058 tests: clean up sanity.sh MDT name generation") test_181 crashed with the following stack trace. The "254" value is consistent across multiple test runs, so it appears to be a struct offset with a NULL pointer:

trevis-154vm94 crashed during sanity test_181
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 181: Test open-unlinked dir ======= 13:01:33 (1771506093)
[11416.005411] BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000254
[11416.007192] Oops: 0000 [#1] SMP NOPTI
[11416.007766] CPU: 0 PID: 1038780 Comm: lfs 4.18.0-553.89.1.el8_10.x86_64 #1
[11416.009458] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM/RHEL, BIOS 1.16.3-4.el9 04/01/2014
[11416.010459] RIP: 0010:mdc_enqueue_base+0x930/0x1bc0 [mdc]
[11416.023665] Call Trace:
[11416.029329]  mdc_intent_lock+0x27a/0x5d0 [mdc]
[11416.032687]  lmv_intent_lookup+0x26c/0x9e0 [lmv]
[11416.035079]  lmv_intent_lock+0x329/0x3a0 [lmv]
[11416.036494]  ll_intent_lock+0xab/0x770 [lustre]
[11416.038047]  ll_inode_revalidate.constprop.71+0x291/0x670 [lustre]
[11416.039009]  ll_getattr_dentry+0x4ce/0x1090 [lustre]
[11416.041904]  vfs_statx+0x8a/0xe0
[11416.042427]  __do_sys_statx+0x3b/0x80
[11416.043040]  do_syscall_64+0x5b/0x1d0

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/121801 - 4.18.0-553.89.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/121801 - 4.18.0-553.89.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_181 - trevis-154vm94 crashed during sanity test_181
item.summary: sanity test_181 12MDT: mdc_enqueue_base() unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000254

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
It appears that the 0x254 address is dereferencing imp_generation from cl_import=NULL in the MDC device for an MDT (not sure which one):

(gdb) list *(mdc_enqueue_base+0x930)
0x15490 is in mdc_enqueue_base (/usr/src/lustre-head/lustre/mdc/mdc_locks.c:1044).
1039                            policy = &getxattr_policy;
1040                    else
1041                            policy = &lookup_policy;
1042            }
1043
1044            generation = obd->u.cli.cl_import->imp_generation;
1045            if (!it || (it->it_op & (IT_OPEN | IT_CREAT)))
1046                    acl_bufsize = min_t(__u32, imp->imp_connect_data.ocd_max_easize,
1047                                        XATTR_SIZE_MAX);
1048            else
(gdb) p &((struct obd_device *)0)->u.cli.cl_import
$1 = (struct obd_import **) 0x638
(gdb) p &((struct obd_import *)0)->imp_generation
$2 = (int *) 0x254
